titleStmt.title: SII 28.71: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 71. (A.R. No. 69 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, north wall of the maṇḍapa in front.

p.hi: Tribhuvanachakravartti Rājarāja (III) Year 24, Siṁha ba. 13, Saturday, Pūśam = 1239 A.D., July 30.

summary.p: States that Araśūruḍaiyāṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala-ppallavarayan, made known to the Ādi-chaṇḍēśvaradēvar-kaṉmis of the temple of Gaṇapatīśvaram-uḍaiyār in Tiruchcheṅgāttāṅguḍi in Marugal-nāḍu in Gēyā-māṇikka-vaḷanāḍu that he had actually endowed 3(1/2) mā of land (though by a different calculation this extent of land is entered as 4 mā in the record), purchased from Nallakūr-uḍaiyāṉ Kaṇṇan Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ of the above ūr, for the various services of God Uttarāpati-nāyakar when he was taken in procession to the tiru-maṇḍapam named Tirumuttuvānēri on the day of Bharaṇi in the month of Chittirai, as also during the festivals in Vaikāśi, and Aippaśi months and also on Amāvāśyā (New moon) days. The expenses as intended were to be out of the reminder after paying iṟai (iṟai-migudi) on the said land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja tevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 siṅṅa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayodaciyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭu marukal nāṭṭut tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭiyil Uṭaiyār kaṇapatiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku Aracūruṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟa
mpalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampalap pallavarāyaṉeṉ Ivvūril nallakūruruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṇaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ pakkal nāṉ vilai koṇṭa tirucciṟṟampalam kal viḷainila mummāvaraiyiṉāl pottakappaṭi Eṟṟi nilam nālumāvum tirumuttuvāṉeṟi yeṉṉut tirunāmattāl ceyvitta tirumaṇṭapattu Utta
rāpati nāyakar cittiraip paraṇiyil muttikuṭukka Eṟi Aruḷi Amutuceytaruḷap poṉakappaḻa Arici Irukalattukkum kaṟi Amutu Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum tirumeṟpūccut tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruviḷakkeṇṇai Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa vaiyiṟṟukkum tiruvaikāci tirunāḷum Aippacit tirunāḷum nāyaṟu potu Eṟi Aruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷi poṉakappaḻa Arici
Irukalattukkum kaṟi Amutu Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉattukkum tirumeṟpūccut tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruviḷakkeṇṇai Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum māta Amavāci Eṟi Aruḷi Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa vaiyiṟṟukkum Innilattāl vanta Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu cantirātittavaraiyum Ippaṭi cellakkaṭavatākac cammatittu Innilam mu
mmāvaraiyum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nirvārttuk kuṭutteṉ Aracūruṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalap pallavarayaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 28.71 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
